# GB Studio - VHS & Video Game Rental Store Assets

This asset pack contains pixel art graphics from a now-abandoned project. Since the project will no longer continue, the assets are released for free with an optional donation if you find them useful.

## Included Assets

| Type | Files |
|------|-------|
| Characters | Player 1, Player 2, Action Cardboard, Sci-Fi Cardboard, Western Cardboard Cutouts |
| Props / Objects | Bargain Bin, CRT Game Kiosk, CRT VHS, Drinks, Gumball Machine, PC, TV Desk |
| Shelves & Tiles | VHS Shelf, VHS Store Walls, TopDown Shelf, VHS Carpet Tileset, Video Game Carpet Tileset |
| Items | VHS Tape M, VHS Tape S, Video Game Cartridge M, Video Game Cartridge S |
| Signs / Labels | Line-up Check, VHS Genres |
| Source Files | All .aseprite (.ase) and .pong files included for editing and animation |

## File Formats

- **.png** — Ready-to-use graphics
- **.aseprite (.ase)** — Editable Aseprite files

## License

These assets are **free for personal and commercial use**. You may:

- Use them in your own games and projects
- Modify or adapt them
- Include them as part of your project

**Attribution is appreciated but not required.**

You **may not** redistribute the assets as-is for sale or claim them as your own.  

No further updates or new assets will be released.  

## Donation

If you find this asset pack useful, consider supporting future free resources via donation: [Your donation link here]
